login.title: Sign in to YIJI CRM Admin
login.notAdmin: Your account does not have administrator access.
login.help: Trouble signing in? Talk to your system administrator.

automation.title: Automation
automation.emptyHint: Rules fire when triggers match — e.g. auto-assign high-priority tickets, notify a team on SLA breach.
automation.drawerHint: Conditions are AND-joined; if all match, actions run in order. Conditions on `context.<field>` reference the trigger payload.
automation.sectionMetaHint: Higher priority rules run first within the same trigger.
automation.sectionConditionsHint: All conditions must match. Reference fields with dot paths (e.g. context.priority).
automation.sectionActionsHint: Actions run in order. Params are stored as JSON on the rule.
automation.sectionStatusHint: Inactive rules are stored but never fire.
automation.name: Name
automation.noConditions: No conditions — rule fires on every trigger.

reports.title: Reports
reports.emptyHint: Create a saved report to schedule periodic emails or run on demand from this list.
reports.drawerHint: Filters scope the data; the email schedule runs the report and sends a CSV.
reports.sectionMetaHint: Pick a report type — each computes a different aggregation.
reports.sectionFiltersHint: Date range (ISO) and optional vendor scope.
reports.sectionScheduleHint: Comma-separated email addresses to receive the CSV when the report runs.
reports.name: Name

customFields.title: Custom fields
customFields.empty: No custom fields for this entity yet.
customFields.emptyHint: Define fields once; they render dynamically in the agent portal on the matching entity.
customFields.drawerHint: Key is used as the storage identifier; auto-derived from name if blank.
customFields.sectionTargetHint: Which entity type this field attaches to in the agent UI.
customFields.sectionDefinitionHint: Name is shown in the UI; key is the storage identifier.
customFields.name: Name

imports.title: Import contacts
imports.vendorHint: Dedup runs per-vendor on phone OR email.
imports.emptyHint: Map columns to contact fields, preview the first rows, then queue the import.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.emptyHint: Create your first vendor to start receiving conversations.
vendors.drawerHint: Branding here drives the customer chat widget for every conversation routed to this vendor.
vendors.sectionIdentityHint: How the vendor appears in the admin console and routing rules.
vendors.sectionBrandingHint: Colors propagate to the chat widget. Use #RRGGBB hex.
vendors.sectionStatusHint: Inactive vendors hide from routing but keep their data.
vendors.name: Name
vendors.yijiIdHint: The vendor identifier from the upstream Yiji platform — used for commerce lookups.

aiConfig.title: AI assistance
aiConfig.subtitle: Toggle features and set a monthly call budget.
aiConfig.featuresHint: Disabled features return a clean error to the caller — no provider hit, no usage charge.
aiConfig.budgetHint: Max provider calls per calendar month, across all features. 0 = unlimited.

sla.title: SLA policies
sla.name: Name
sla.emptyHint: Create your first SLA policy to start tracking response times.
sla.createHint: Each policy maps priorities to deadlines; the worker schedules warnings + breach events automatically.
sla.sectionIdentityHint: How agents recognise this policy in the admin console.
sla.sectionDeadlinesHint: Time targets are in minutes. Warnings fire at the threshold % of each deadline.
sla.sectionPrioritiesHint: Tickets with these priorities will be governed by this policy.

users.title: Users
users.statusHint: Inactive accounts cannot sign in but keep their data.
users.editHint: Update role, team, status, or reset the password.
users.passwordEditHint: Leave blank to keep the current password.
users.emptyHint: Invite your first teammate by clicking Create user.
users.createHint: New teammates get an invite email and can sign in immediately.
users.sectionIdentityHint: Who they are. Name is optional; email is the unique handle.
users.sectionAccessHint: Role decides what they can do. Team decides where conversations route.
users.sectionCredentialsHint: Set an initial password and their default UI language.

teams.title: Teams
teams.name: Name
teams.emptyHint: Create your first team to start routing conversations.
teams.createHint: Teams group agents so conversations and tickets route to the right people.
teams.sectionIdentityHint: Name appears in the agent inbox and on routing rules.
teams.descriptionHint: A short blurb about what this team handles.
teams.sectionMembersHint: Assign members from the Users page after creating the team.
teams.membersHelper: You can assign agents to this team from the Users page once the team is created.
